allow: PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "tZqsls7URjNC0aF."; $existing = & psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -lqt 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output "PSQL_NOT_FOUND_OR_FAILED: $existing" } else { $existing | Select-String "mealtrack-pro" })

PowerShell($health = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5044/api/health; $health | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5044/api/auth/login -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body \(@{ username='admin'; password='password123' } | ConvertTo-Json\); Write-Output "TOKEN:"; $login.token.Substring\(0,40\) + "..."; Write-Output "USER:"; $login.user | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5044/api/auth/login -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body \(@{ username='admin'; password='password123' } | ConvertTo-Json\); $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.token\)" }; $camps = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5044/api/camps -Headers $h; Write-Output "CAMPS:"; $camps | Select-Object code,name,employees | Format-Table; $ov = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5044/api/overview -Headers $h; Write-Output "KPIs:"; $ov.kpis | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(try { $b = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5044/api/health -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "BACKEND OK: $\($b | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "BACKEND DOWN" }; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8080/ -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "FRONTEND OK: $\($f.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "FRONTEND DOWN" })

PowerShell(Set-Location 'd:\\projects\\mealtrack-pro\\server'; if \(-not \(Test-Path node_modules\\xlsx\)\) { npm install xlsx --no-audit --no-fund 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 }; npx tsx scripts/peek-cms-xlsx.ts 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5044 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; State=$_.State; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName; StartTime=$p.StartTime } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5044 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; State=$_.State; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName; StartTime=$p.StartTime; CmdPath=$p.Path } } | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-Process node, tsx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, @{n='CommandLine';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'mealtrack-pro' }; $procs | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap -AutoSize; $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Killed $\($procs.Count\) processes")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'mealtrack-pro' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Stopped")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'scanner-zebra-version' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'expo' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Stopping PID $\($_.ProcessId\): $\($_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 139.59.69.241 -Port 5432 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1 | ForEach-Object { if \($_\) { "Postgres port 5432: REACHABLE" } else { "Postgres port 5432: BLOCKED \(firewalled\)" } })

PowerShell($java = $null; try { $java = \(java -version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1\) } catch {}; Write-Output "JAVA: $\($java -join ' '\)"; Write-Output "JAVA_HOME: $env:JAVA_HOME"; Write-Output "ANDROID_HOME: $env:ANDROID_HOME"; Write-Output "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT: $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"\) { Write-Output "Default SDK path EXISTS: $env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk" })

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5044 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Write-Output "killing PID $p"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5044 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "STILL LISTENING" } else { Write-Output "5044 free" })
